zh.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh.North Elmsall, Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Eng: 英國英格蘭越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Wentworth於1395年出生在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾時，他的父親Sir John Wentworth51歲，母親Agnes Dronsfield42歲。他於1408年與Cecilia Tansley在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1477年12月20日在他的家鄉享年82歲。

zh-hans.North Elmsall, Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Eng: 英国英格兰越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Wentworth于1395年出生在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾时，他的父亲Sir John Wentworth51岁，母亲Agnes Dronsfield42岁。他于1408年与Cecilia Tansley在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1477年12月20日在他的家乡享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Wentworth was born in 1395, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Wentworth, was 51 and his mother, Agnes Dronsfield, was 42. He married Cecilia Tansley in 1408, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 December 1477, in his hometown, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Wentworth est né en 1395, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Wentworth, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Agnes Dronsfield, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Tansley en 1408, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1477, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Wentworthが1395年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルで生まれた時，父Sir John Wentworthは51歳，母Agnes Dronsfieldは42歳であった。1408年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでCecilia Tansleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1477年12月20日に故郷で82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Wentworth(이)가 1395년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wentworth(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Dronsfield(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1408년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Cecilia Tansley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1477년 12월 20일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Wentworth родился в 1395 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Wentworth было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Dronsfield, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Tansley в 1408 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 декабря 1477 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет.
